001package io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor;
002
003import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JavaType;
004import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.type.ArrayType;
005import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.type.CollectionType;
006import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.type.MapType;
007import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.type.TypeFactory;
008import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.BJSL;
009import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.elements.ParsedArray;
010import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.elements.ParsedElement;
011import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.elements.ParsedObject;
012import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.elements.ParsedPrimitive;
013import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.parsers.exception.InvalidTypeException;
014import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.annotations.AlwaysSerialize;
015import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.annotations.NeverSerialize;
016import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.annotations.Rename;
017import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.conditions.ExpectGreaterThan;
018import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.conditions.ExpectIsNull;
019import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.conditions.ExpectLessThan;
020import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.conditions.ExpectNotNull;
021import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.exception.*;
022import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.reflection.InitializationUtil;
023import io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.reflection.TypeUtils;
024import java.io.PrintWriter;
025import java.io.StringWriter;
026import java.lang.annotation.Annotation;
027import java.lang.reflect.Field;
028import java.lang.reflect.Modifier;
029import java.lang.reflect.Type;
030import java.util.*;
031import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
032import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
033
034/**
035 * An Object processor for mapping elements to objects and objects to elements
036 * <p>
037 * Also has options for reducing the amount of output keys
038 *
039 * @version 2.0.0
040 * @since 1.0.0
041 */
042public class ObjectProcessor {
043    /**
044     * Whether null values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
045     *
046     * @since 1.0.0
047     */
048    protected final boolean ignoreNulls;
049
050    /**
051     * Whether null values should be ignored when serializing lists and arrays
052     *
053     * @since 4.0.0
054     */
055    protected final boolean ignoreArrayNulls;
056
057    /**
058     * Whether empty objects (Objects with a size of 0) should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
059     *
060     * @since 1.0.0
061     */
062    protected final boolean ignoreEmptyObjects;
063
064    /**
065     * Whether default values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
066     * <p>
067     * These are gotten from the value in a new instance of the object
068     *
069     * @since 1.0.0
070     */
071    protected final boolean ignoreDefaults;
072
073    /**
074     * Whether checks for enum names should be case-sensitive
075     *
076     * @since 1.0.0
077     */
078    protected final boolean caseSensitiveEnums;
079
080    /**
081     * A map of object types to type processors
082     *
083     * @since 1.0.0
084     */
085    protected final @NotNull Map<JavaType, TypeProcessor> typeProcessors;
086
087    /**
088     * Create a new ObjectProcessor using certain factories
089     *
090     * @param ignoreNulls        Whether null values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
091     * @param ignoreArrayNulls   Whether null values should be ignored when serializing lists and arrays
092     * @param ignoreEmptyObjects Whether empty objects (Objects with a size of 0) should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
093     * @param ignoreDefaults     Whether default values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
094     * @param caseSensitiveEnums Whether checks for enum names should be case-sensitive
095     * @param typeProcessors     A map of object types to type processors
096     *
097     * @since 1.0.0
098     */
099    protected ObjectProcessor(boolean ignoreNulls, boolean ignoreArrayNulls, boolean ignoreEmptyObjects, boolean ignoreDefaults, boolean caseSensitiveEnums, @NotNull Map<JavaType, TypeProcessor> typeProcessors) {
100        this.ignoreNulls = ignoreNulls;
101        this.ignoreArrayNulls = ignoreArrayNulls;
102        this.ignoreEmptyObjects = ignoreEmptyObjects;
103        this.ignoreDefaults = ignoreDefaults;
104
105        this.caseSensitiveEnums = caseSensitiveEnums;
106
107        this.typeProcessors = typeProcessors;
108    }
109
110    /**
111     * A builder class for creating new {@link ObjectProcessor}s
112     *
113     * @version 2.0.0
114     * @since 1.0.0
115     */
116    public static class Builder {
117        /**
118         * Whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
119         * <p>
120         * Default is false
121         *
122         * @since 1.0.0
123         */
124        protected boolean ignoreNulls = false;
125
126        /**
127         * Whether null values should be ignored when serializing lists and arrays
128         * <p>
129         * Default is true
130         *
131         * @since 4.0.0
132         */
133        protected boolean ignoreArrayNulls = false;
134
135        /**
136         * Whether or not empty objects (Objects with a size of 0) should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
137         * <p>
138         * Default is false
139         *
140         * @since 1.0.0
141         */
142        protected boolean ignoreEmptyObjects = false;
143
144        /**
145         * Whether or not default values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
146         * <p>
147         * These are gotten from the value in a new instance of the object
148         * <p>
149         * Default is false
150         *
151         * @since 1.0.0
152         */
153        protected boolean ignoreDefaults = false;
154
155        /**
156         * Whether checks for enum names should be case-sensitive
157         * <p>
158         * Default is false
159         *
160         * @since 1.0.0
161         */
162        protected boolean caseSensitiveEnums = false;
163
164        /**
165         * A map of object types to type processors
166         *
167         * @since 1.0.0
168         */
169        protected final @NotNull Map<JavaType, TypeProcessor> typeProcessors = new HashMap<>();
170
171        /**
172         * The options for the default type processors, null means disable the default type processors
173         *
174         * @since 2.0.0
175         */
176        protected @Nullable DefaultTypeProcessors.Options defaultTypeProcessorsOptions = DefaultTypeProcessors.Options.DEFAULT;
177
178        /**
179         * Create a new {@link ObjectProcessor} builder
180         *
181         * @since 1.0.0
182         */
183        public Builder() {
184        }
185
186        /**
187         * Get whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
188         * <p>
189         * Default is false
190         *
191         * @return Whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
192         *
193         * @since 1.0.0
194         */
195        public boolean getIgnoreNulls() {
196            return this.ignoreNulls;
197        }
198
199        /**
200         * Set whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
201         * <p>
202         * Default is false
203         *
204         * @param value Whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
205         *
206         * @return Self for chaining
207         *
208         * @since 1.0.0
209         */
210        public @NotNull Builder setIgnoreNulls(boolean value) {
211            this.ignoreNulls = value;
212
213            return this;
214        }
215
216        /**
217         * Get whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing lists and arrays
218         * <p>
219         * Default is false
220         *
221         * @return Whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing lists and arrays
222         *
223         * @since 4.0.0
224         */
225        public boolean getIgnoreArrayNulls() {
226            return this.ignoreArrayNulls;
227        }
228
229        /**
230         * Set whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing lists and arrays
231         * <p>
232         * Default is false
233         *
234         * @param value Whether or not null values should be ignored when serializing lists and arrays
235         *
236         * @return Self for chaining
237         *
238         * @since 4.0.0
239         */
240        public @NotNull Builder setIgnoreArrayNulls(boolean value) {
241            this.ignoreArrayNulls = value;
242
243            return this;
244        }
245
246        /**
247         * Get whether or not empty objects (Objects with a size of 0) should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
248         * <p>
249         * Default is false
250         *
251         * @return Whether or not empty objects (Objects with a size of 0) should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
252         *
253         * @since 1.0.0
254         */
255        public boolean getIgnoreEmptyObjects() {
256            return this.ignoreEmptyObjects;
257        }
258
259        /**
260         * Set whether or not empty objects (Objects with a size of 0) should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
261         * <p>
262         * Default is false
263         *
264         * @param value Whether or not empty objects (Objects with a size of 0) should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
265         *
266         * @return Self for chaining
267         *
268         * @since 1.0.0
269         */
270        public @NotNull Builder setIgnoreEmptyObjects(boolean value) {
271            this.ignoreEmptyObjects = value;
272
273            return this;
274        }
275
276        /**
277         * Get whether or not default values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
278         * <p>
279         * These are gotten from the value in a new instance of the object
280         * <p>
281         * Default is false
282         *
283         * @return Whether or not default values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
284         *
285         * @since 1.0.0
286         */
287        public boolean getIgnoreDefaults() {
288            return this.ignoreDefaults;
289        }
290
291        /**
292         * Set whether or not default values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
293         * <p>
294         * These are gotten from the value in a new instance of the object
295         * <p>
296         * Default is false
297         *
298         * @param value Whether or not default values should be ignored when serializing maps and objects
299         *
300         * @return Self for chaining
301         *
302         * @since 1.0.0
303         */
304        public @NotNull Builder setIgnoreDefaults(boolean value) {
305            this.ignoreDefaults = value;
306
307            return this;
308        }
309
310        /**
311         * Get whether checks for enum names should be case-sensitive
312         * <p>
313         * Default is false
314         *
315         * @return Whether checks for enum names should be case-sensitive
316         *
317         * @since 1.0.0
318         */
319        public boolean getCaseSensitiveEnums() {
320            return this.caseSensitiveEnums;
321        }
322
323        /**
324         * Set whether checks for enum names should be case-sensitive
325         * <p>
326         * Default is false
327         *
328         * @param value Whether checks for enum names should be case-sensitive
329         *
330         * @return Self for chaining
331         *
332         * @since 1.0.0
333         */
334        public @NotNull Builder setCaseSensitiveEnums(boolean value) {
335            this.caseSensitiveEnums = value;
336
337            return this;
338        }
339
340        /**
341         * Get all the type processors created
342         *
343         * @return All the type processors created
344         *
345         * @since 1.0.0
346         */
347        public @NotNull Map<JavaType, TypeProcessor> getTypeProcessors() {
348            return this.typeProcessors;
349        }
350
351        /**
352         * Check if a type processor exists for this class
353         * <p>
354         * Calls {@link #hasTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
355         *
356         * @param clazz The class to check for
357         *
358         * @return If a type processor for clazz exists
359         *
360         * @since 1.0.0
361         */
362        public boolean hasTypeProcessor(@NotNull Class<?> clazz) {
363            return this.hasTypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructSimpleType(clazz, new JavaType[] { }));
364        }
365
366        /**
367         * Check if a type processor exists for this class or a super class
368         * <p>
369         * Calls {@link #hasTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
370         *
371         * @param clazz The class to check for
372         *
373         * @return If a type processor for clazz exists
374         *
375         * @since 1.0.0
376         */
377        public boolean hasTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(@NotNull Class<?> clazz) {
378            return this.hasTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructSimpleType(clazz, new JavaType[] { }));
379        }
380
381        /**
382         * Check if a type processor exists for this class
383         * <p>
384         * Calls {@link #hasTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
385         *
386         * @param type The type to check for
387         *
388         * @return If a type processor for type exists
389         *
390         * @since 1.0.0
391         */
392        public boolean hasTypeProcessor(@NotNull Type type) {
393            return this.hasTypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructType(type));
394        }
395
396        /**
397         * Check if a type processor exists for this class or a super class
398         * <p>
399         * Calls {@link #hasTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
400         *
401         * @param type The type to check for
402         *
403         * @return If a type processor for type exists
404         *
405         * @since 1.0.0
406         */
407        public boolean hasTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(@NotNull Type type) {
408            return this.hasTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructType(type));
409        }
410
411        /**
412         * Check if a type processor exists for this class
413         *
414         * @param type The type to check for
415         *
416         * @return If a type processor for type exists
417         *
418         * @since 1.0.0
419         */
420        public boolean hasTypeProcessor(@NotNull JavaType type) {
421            return typeProcessors.entrySet().stream().anyMatch(entry -> TypeUtils.isType(type, entry.getKey()));
422        }
423
424        /**
425         * Check if a type processor exists for this class or a super class
426         *
427         * @param type The type to check for
428         *
429         * @return If a type processor for type exists
430         *
431         * @since 1.0.0
432         */
433        public boolean hasTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(@NotNull JavaType type) {
434            return typeProcessors.entrySet().stream().anyMatch(entry -> TypeUtils.isTypeOrSuperTypeOf(type, entry.getKey()));
435        }
436
437        /**
438         * Get a type processor for this class
439         * <p>
440         * Calls {@link #getTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
441         *
442         * @param clazz The class to get
443         *
444         * @return The type processor for class
445         *
446         * @since 1.0.0
447         */
448        public @NotNull TypeProcessor getTypeProcessor(@NotNull Class<?> clazz) {
449            return this.getTypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructSimpleType(clazz, new JavaType[] { }));
450        }
451
452        /**
453         * Get a type processor for this class or a superclass
454         * <p>
455         * Calls {@link #getTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
456         *
457         * @param clazz The class to get
458         *
459         * @return The type processor for class
460         *
461         * @since 1.0.0
462         */
463        public @NotNull TypeProcessor getTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(@NotNull Class<?> clazz) {
464            return this.getTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructSimpleType(clazz, new JavaType[] { }));
465        }
466
467        /**
468         * Get a type processor for this class
469         * <p>
470         * Calls {@link #getTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
471         *
472         * @param type The type to get
473         *
474         * @return The type processor for type
475         *
476         * @since 1.0.0
477         */
478        public @NotNull TypeProcessor getTypeProcessor(@NotNull Type type) {
479            return this.getTypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructType(type));
480        }
481
482        /**
483         * Get a type processor for this class or a superclass
484         * <p>
485         * Calls {@link #getTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
486         *
487         * @param type The type to get
488         *
489         * @return The type processor for type
490         *
491         * @since 1.0.0
492         */
493        public @NotNull TypeProcessor getTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(@NotNull Type type) {
494            return this.getTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructType(type));
495        }
496
497        /**
498         * Get a type processor for this class
499         *
500         * @param type The type to get
501         *
502         * @return The type processor for type
503         *
504         * @since 1.0.0
505         */
506        public @NotNull TypeProcessor getTypeProcessor(@NotNull JavaType type) {
507            return typeProcessors.entrySet().stream().filter(entry -> TypeUtils.isType(type, entry.getKey())).findFirst().orElseThrow().getValue();
508        }
509
510        /**
511         * Get a type processor for this class or a superclass
512         *
513         * @param type The type to get
514         *
515         * @return The type processor for type
516         *
517         * @since 1.0.0
518         */
519        public @NotNull TypeProcessor getTypeOrSupertypeProcessor(@NotNull JavaType type) {
520            return typeProcessors.entrySet().stream().filter(entry -> TypeUtils.isTypeOrSuperTypeOf(type, entry.getKey())).sorted((entryA, entryB) -> TypeUtils.sortDistance(type, entryA.getKey(), entryB.getKey())).findFirst().orElseThrow().getValue();
521        }
522
523        /**
524         * Create a type processor
525         * <p>
526         * Calls {@link #createTypeProcessor(JavaType, TypeProcessor)}
527         *
528         * @param clazz The class to create
529         * @param value The type processor to use
530         *
531         * @return Self for chaining
532         *
533         * @since 1.0.0
534         */
535        public @NotNull Builder createTypeProcessor(@NotNull Class<?> clazz, @NotNull TypeProcessor value) {
536            return this.createTypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructSimpleType(clazz, new JavaType[] { }), value);
537        }
538
539        /**
540         * Create a type processor
541         * <p>
542         * Calls {@link #createTypeProcessor(JavaType, TypeProcessor)}
543         *
544         * @param type  The type to create
545         * @param value The type processor to use
546         *
547         * @return Self for chaining
548         *
549         * @since 1.0.0
550         */
551        public @NotNull Builder createTypeProcessor(@NotNull Type type, @NotNull TypeProcessor value) {
552            return this.createTypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructType(type), value);
553        }
554
555        /**
556         * Create a type processor
557         *
558         * @param type  The type to create
559         * @param value The type processor to use
560         *
561         * @return Self for chaining
562         *
563         * @since 1.0.0
564         */
565        public @NotNull Builder createTypeProcessor(@NotNull JavaType type, @NotNull TypeProcessor value) {
566            if (this.hasTypeProcessor(type)) {
567                throw new NullPointerException("A type processor already exists for class \"" + type.getRawClass().getSimpleName() + "\"");
568            }
569
570            this.typeProcessors.put(type, value);
571
572            return this;
573        }
574
575        /**
576         * Remove a type processor
577         * <p>
578         * Calls {@link #removeTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
579         *
580         * @param clazz The class to remove
581         *
582         * @return Self for chaining
583         *
584         * @since 1.0.0
585         */
586        public @NotNull Builder removeTypeProcessor(@NotNull Class<?> clazz) {
587            return this.removeTypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructSimpleType(clazz, new JavaType[] { }));
588        }
589
590        /**
591         * Remove a type processor
592         * <p>
593         * Calls {@link #removeTypeProcessor(JavaType)}
594         *
595         * @param type The type to remove
596         *
597         * @return Self for chaining
598         *
599         * @since 1.0.0
600         */
601        public @NotNull Builder removeTypeProcessor(@NotNull Type type) {
602            return this.removeTypeProcessor(TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructType(type));
603        }
604
605        /**
606         * Remove a type processor
607         *
608         * @param type The type to remove
609         *
610         * @return Self for chaining
611         *
612         * @since 1.0.0
613         */
614        public @NotNull Builder removeTypeProcessor(@NotNull JavaType type) {
615            if (!this.hasTypeProcessor(type)) {
616                throw new NullPointerException("A type processor does not exists for class \"" + type.getRawClass().getSimpleName() + "\"");
617            }
618
619            this.typeProcessors.remove(type);
620
621            return this;
622        }
623
624        /**
625         * Get the options for the default type processors, null means disable the default type processors
626         *
627         * @return The options for the default type processors, null means disable the default type processors
628         *
629         * @since 2.0.0
630         */
631        public @Nullable DefaultTypeProcessors.Options getDefaultTypeProcessorsOptions() {
632            return this.defaultTypeProcessorsOptions;
633        }
634
635        /**
636         * Set the options for the default type processors, null means disable the default type processors
637         *
638         * @param value The options for the default type processors, null means disable the default type processors
639         *
640         * @return Self for chaining
641         *
642         * @since 2.0.0
643         */
644        public @NotNull Builder setDefaultTypeProcessorsOptions(@Nullable DefaultTypeProcessors.Options value) {
645            this.defaultTypeProcessorsOptions = value;
646
647            return this;
648        }
649
650        /**
651         * Uses the current settings to build a new {@link ObjectProcessor}
652         *
653         * @return A new {@link ObjectProcessor} instance
654         *
655         * @since 1.0.0
656         */
657        public @NotNull ObjectProcessor build() {
658            if (this.defaultTypeProcessorsOptions != null) {
659                DefaultTypeProcessors.register(this);
660            }
661
662            return new ObjectProcessor(this.ignoreNulls, this.ignoreArrayNulls, this.ignoreEmptyObjects, this.ignoreDefaults, this.caseSensitiveEnums, this.typeProcessors);
663        }
664    }
665
666    /**
667     * Helper method to check if an element should be ignored during serialization
668     *
669     * @param subElement The element to check
670     *
671     * @return true if the element should be ignored, false otherwise
672     *
673     * @since 2.0.0
674     */
675    private boolean shouldIgnoreElement(@NotNull ParsedElement subElement) {
676        return (ignoreNulls && (subElement.isPrimitive() && subElement.asPrimitive().isNull())) || (ignoreEmptyObjects && ((subElement.isObject() && subElement.asObject().getSize() == 0) || (subElement.isArray() && subElement.asArray().getSize() == 0)));
677    }
678
679    /**
680     * Helper method to check if an object should be ignored during deserialization
681     *
682     * @param subObject The object to check
683     *
684     * @return true if the object should be ignored, false otherwise
685     *
686     * @since 2.0.0
687     */
688    private boolean shouldIgnoreObject(@Nullable Object subObject, boolean isArrayElement) {
689        return (!isArrayElement && ignoreNulls && subObject == null) || (isArrayElement && ignoreArrayNulls && subObject == null) || (ignoreEmptyObjects && subObject instanceof Object[] objects && objects.length == 0) || (ignoreEmptyObjects && subObject instanceof Collection<?> collection && collection.isEmpty()) || (ignoreEmptyObjects && subObject instanceof Map<?, ?> map && map.isEmpty());
690    }
691
692    /**
693     * Maps this element into an Object
694     * <p>
695     * Calls {@link #toObject(ParsedElement, JavaType)}
696     *
697     * @param element The element to map
698     * @param clazz   The object type to map to
699     * @param <T>     The object type to map to
700     *
701     * @return A new Object of passed type with the values of element
702     *
703     * @throws io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.exception.ProcessorException If there is an exception while processing
704     * @since 1.0.0
705     */
706    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
707    public <T> @Nullable T toObject(@NotNull ParsedElement element, @NotNull Class<T> clazz) {
708        return (T) toObject(element, TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructSimpleType(clazz, new JavaType[] { }));
709    }
710
711    /**
712     * Maps this element into an Object
713     * <p>
714     * Calls {@link #toObject(ParsedElement, JavaType)}
715     *
716     * @param element The element to map
717     * @param type    The object type to map to
718     *
719     * @return A new Object of passed type with the values of element
720     *
721     * @throws io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.exception.ProcessorException If there is an exception while processing
722     * @since 1.0.0
723     */
724    public @Nullable Object toObject(@NotNull ParsedElement element, @NotNull Type type) {
725        return toObject(element, TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructType(type));
726    }
727
728    /**
729     * Maps this element into an Object
730     *
731     * @param element The element to map
732     * @param type    The object type to map to
733     *
734     * @return A new Object of passed type with the values of element
735     *
736     * @throws io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.exception.ProcessorException If there is an exception while processing
737     * @since 1.0.0
738     */
739    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
740    public @Nullable Object toObject(@NotNull ParsedElement element, @NotNull JavaType type) {
741        try {
742            if (element.isPrimitive() && element.asPrimitive().isNull()) {
743                return null;
744            }
745
746            {
747                Optional<TypeProcessor> typeProcessor = typeProcessors.entrySet().stream().filter(entry -> TypeUtils.isTypeOrSuperTypeOf(type, entry.getKey())).sorted((entryA, entryB) -> TypeUtils.sortDistance(type, entryA.getKey(), entryB.getKey())).map(Map.Entry::getValue).findFirst();
748                if (typeProcessor.isPresent()) {
749                    return typeProcessor.get().toObject(element);
750                }
751            }
752
753            if (element instanceof ParsedPrimitive) {
754                if (type.getRawClass().isEnum()) {
755                    if (element.asPrimitive().isString()) {
756                        for (Object value : type.getRawClass().getEnumConstants()) {
757                            if ((!caseSensitiveEnums && ((Enum<?>) value).name().equalsIgnoreCase(element.asPrimitive().asString())) || (caseSensitiveEnums && ((Enum<?>) value).name().equals(element.asPrimitive().asString()))) {
758                                return value;
759                            }
760                        }
761
762                        if (BJSL.getLogger() != null) {
763                            BJSL.getLogger().warning("Unknown enum value \"" + element.asPrimitive().asString() + "\" for type \"" + type.getRawClass().getSimpleName() + "\"");
764                        }
765
766                        return null;
767                    } else {
768                        throw new EnumExpectedException(type.getRawClass());
769                    }
770                } else {
771                    Object object = element.asPrimitive().get();
772
773                    if (object == null) {
774                        return null;
775                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == String.class) {
776                        return object.toString();
777                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == Byte.class || type.getRawClass() == byte.class) {
778                        if (object.getClass() == String.class) {
779                            return Byte.parseByte((String) object);
780                        } else if (object.getClass() == Character.class) {
781                            return (byte) (char) object;
782                        } else if (object.getClass() == Short.class) {
783                            return (byte) (short) object;
784                        } else if (object.getClass() == Integer.class) {
785                            return (byte) (int) object;
786                        } else if (object.getClass() == Long.class) {
787                            return (byte) (long) object;
788                        } else if (object.getClass() == Float.class) {
789                            return (byte) (float) object;
790                        } else if (object.getClass() == Double.class) {
791                            return (byte) (double) object;
792                        } else {
793                            return (byte) object;
794                        }
795                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == Character.class || type.getRawClass() == char.class) {
796                        if (object.getClass() == String.class) {
797                            return ((String) object).charAt(0);
798                        } else if (object.getClass() == Byte.class) {
799                            return (char) (byte) object;
800                        } else if (object.getClass() == Short.class) {
801                            return (char) (short) object;
802                        } else if (object.getClass() == Integer.class) {
803                            return (char) (int) object;
804                        } else if (object.getClass() == Long.class) {
805                            return (char) (long) object;
806                        } else if (object.getClass() == Float.class) {
807                            return (char) (float) object;
808                        } else if (object.getClass() == Double.class) {
809                            return (char) (double) object;
810                        } else {
811                            return (char) object;
812                        }
813                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == Short.class || type.getRawClass() == short.class) {
814                        if (object.getClass() == String.class) {
815                            return Short.parseShort((String) object);
816                        } else if (object.getClass() == Byte.class) {
817                            return (short) (byte) object;
818                        } else if (object.getClass() == Character.class) {
819                            return (short) (char) object;
820                        } else if (object.getClass() == Integer.class) {
821                            return (short) (int) object;
822                        } else if (object.getClass() == Long.class) {
823                            return (short) (long) object;
824                        } else if (object.getClass() == Float.class) {
825                            return (short) (float) object;
826                        } else if (object.getClass() == Double.class) {
827                            return (short) (double) object;
828                        } else {
829                            return (short) object;
830                        }
831                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == Integer.class || type.getRawClass() == int.class) {
832                        if (object.getClass() == String.class) {
833                            return Integer.parseInt((String) object);
834                        } else if (object.getClass() == Byte.class) {
835                            return (int) (byte) object;
836                        } else if (object.getClass() == Character.class) {
837                            return (int) (char) object;
838                        } else if (object.getClass() == Short.class) {
839                            return (int) (short) object;
840                        } else if (object.getClass() == Long.class) {
841                            return (int) (long) object;
842                        } else if (object.getClass() == Float.class) {
843                            return (int) (float) object;
844                        } else if (object.getClass() == Double.class) {
845                            return (int) (double) object;
846                        } else {
847                            return (int) object;
848                        }
849                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == Long.class || type.getRawClass() == long.class) {
850                        if (object.getClass() == String.class) {
851                            return Long.parseLong((String) object);
852                        } else if (object.getClass() == Byte.class) {
853                            return (long) (byte) object;
854                        } else if (object.getClass() == Character.class) {
855                            return (long) (char) object;
856                        } else if (object.getClass() == Short.class) {
857                            return (long) (short) object;
858                        } else if (object.getClass() == Integer.class) {
859                            return (long) (int) object;
860                        } else if (object.getClass() == Float.class) {
861                            return (long) (float) object;
862                        } else if (object.getClass() == Double.class) {
863                            return (long) (double) object;
864                        } else {
865                            return (long) object;
866                        }
867                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == Float.class || type.getRawClass() == float.class) {
868                        if (object.getClass() == String.class) {
869                            return Float.parseFloat((String) object);
870                        } else if (object.getClass() == Byte.class) {
871                            return (float) (byte) object;
872                        } else if (object.getClass() == Character.class) {
873                            return (float) (char) object;
874                        } else if (object.getClass() == Short.class) {
875                            return (float) (short) object;
876                        } else if (object.getClass() == Integer.class) {
877                            return (float) (int) object;
878                        } else if (object.getClass() == Long.class) {
879                            return (float) (long) object;
880                        } else if (object.getClass() == Double.class) {
881                            return (float) (double) object;
882                        } else {
883                            return (float) object;
884                        }
885                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == Double.class || type.getRawClass() == double.class) {
886                        if (object.getClass() == String.class) {
887                            return Double.parseDouble((String) object);
888                        } else if (object.getClass() == Byte.class) {
889                            return (double) (byte) object;
890                        } else if (object.getClass() == Character.class) {
891                            return (double) (char) object;
892                        } else if (object.getClass() == Short.class) {
893                            return (double) (short) object;
894                        } else if (object.getClass() == Integer.class) {
895                            return (double) (int) object;
896                        } else if (object.getClass() == Long.class) {
897                            return (double) (long) object;
898                        } else if (object.getClass() == Float.class) {
899                            return (double) (float) object;
900                        } else {
901                            return (double) object;
902                        }
903                    } else if (type.getRawClass() == Boolean.class || type.getRawClass() == boolean.class) {
904                        if (object.getClass() == String.class) {
905                            return Boolean.parseBoolean((String) object);
906                        } else {
907                            return (boolean) object;
908                        }
909                    } else {
910                        if (BJSL.getLogger() != null) {
911                            BJSL.getLogger().severe("Something went wrong! Primitive was passed to a non primitive type");
912                        }
913
914                        return null;
915                    }
916                }
917            } else if (!type.getRawClass().isAnonymousClass() && !type.getRawClass().isAnnotation()) {
918                switch (element) {
919                    case ParsedObject parsedObject -> {
920                        if (type instanceof MapType) {
921                            Map<Object, Object> object;
922                            if (!type.getRawClass().isInterface()) {
923                                object = (Map<Object, Object>) InitializationUtil.initialize(type.getRawClass());
924                            } else {
925                                object = InitializationUtil.initialize(LinkedHashMap.class);
926                            }
927
928                            for (Map.Entry<String, ParsedElement> entry : element.asObject().getEntries()) {
929                                Object subObject = toObject(entry.getValue(), type.getContentType());
930                                if (!shouldIgnoreObject(subObject, false)) {
931                                    object.put(toObject(ParsedPrimitive.fromString(entry.getKey()), type.getKeyType()), subObject);
932                                }
933                            }
934
935                            return object;
936                        } else if (!type.getRawClass().isInterface()) {
937                            Object object = InitializationUtil.initialize(type.getRawClass());
938
939                            List<Field> fields = getFields(object.getClass());
940                            for (Field field : fields) {
941                                if (!Modifier.isStatic(field.getModifiers()) && (field.canAccess(object) || field.trySetAccessible())) {
942                                    boolean shouldSerialize = !(Modifier.isTransient(field.getModifiers()) || field.getName().startsWith("this$"));
943
944                                    String subKey = field.getName();
945                                    boolean expect = false;
946
947                                    for (Annotation annotation : field.getDeclaredAnnotations()) {
948                                        if (annotation.annotationType() == AlwaysSerialize.class) {
949                                            shouldSerialize = true;
950                                        } else if (annotation.annotationType() == NeverSerialize.class) {
951                                            shouldSerialize = false;
952                                        } else if (annotation.annotationType() == Rename.class) {
953                                            subKey = ((Rename) annotation).value();
954                                        } else if (annotation.annotationType() == ExpectNotNull.class || annotation.annotationType() == ExpectIsNull.class || annotation.annotationType() == ExpectGreaterThan.class || annotation.annotationType() == ExpectLessThan.class) {
955                                            expect = true;
956                                        }
957                                    }
958
959                                    if (shouldSerialize && element.asObject().has(subKey)) {
960                                        Object subObject = toObject(element.asObject().get(subKey), field.getGenericType());
961
962                                        if (expect) {
963                                            for (Annotation annotation : field.getDeclaredAnnotations()) {
964                                                if (annotation.annotationType() == ExpectNotNull.class) {
965                                                    if (subObject == null) {
966                                                        throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " != null");
967                                                    }
968                                                } else if (annotation.annotationType() == ExpectIsNull.class) {
969                                                    if (subObject != null) {
970                                                        throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " == null");
971                                                    }
972                                                } else if (annotation.annotationType() == ExpectGreaterThan.class) {
973                                                    if (object.getClass() == Byte.class || object.getClass() == Short.class || object.getClass() == Integer.class) {
974                                                        if (subObject == null || (int) subObject > (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).intValue() - (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? 1 : 0))) {
975                                                            throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " >" + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? "=" : "") + " " + ((ExpectLessThan) annotation).intValue());
976                                                        }
977                                                    } else if (object.getClass() == Long.class) {
978                                                        if (subObject == null || (long) subObject > (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).longValue() - (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? 1 : 0))) {
979                                                            throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " >" + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? "=" : "") + " " + ((ExpectLessThan) annotation).longValue());
980                                                        }
981                                                    } else if (object.getClass() == Float.class) {
982                                                        if (subObject == null || (float) subObject > (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).floatValue() - (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? 1 : 0))) {
983                                                            throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " >" + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? "=" : "") + " " + ((ExpectLessThan) annotation).floatValue());
984                                                        }
985                                                    } else if (object.getClass() == Double.class) {
986                                                        if (subObject == null || (double) subObject > (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).doubleValue() - (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? 1 : 0))) {
987                                                            throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " >" + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? "=" : "") + " " + ((ExpectLessThan) annotation).doubleValue());
988                                                        }
989                                                    } else {
990                                                        throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " is not a number");
991                                                    }
992                                                } else if (annotation.annotationType() == ExpectLessThan.class) {
993                                                    if (object.getClass() == Byte.class || object.getClass() == Short.class || object.getClass() == Integer.class) {
994                                                        if (subObject == null || (int) subObject < (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).intValue() + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? 1 : 0))) {
995                                                            throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " <" + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? "=" : "") + " " + ((ExpectLessThan) annotation).intValue());
996                                                        }
997                                                    } else if (object.getClass() == Long.class) {
998                                                        if (subObject == null || (long) subObject < (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).longValue() + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? 1 : 0))) {
999                                                            throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " <" + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? "=" : "") + " " + ((ExpectLessThan) annotation).longValue());
1000                                                        }
1001                                                    } else if (object.getClass() == Float.class) {
1002                                                        if (subObject == null || (float) subObject < (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).floatValue() + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? 1 : 0))) {
1003                                                            throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " <" + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? "=" : "") + " " + ((ExpectLessThan) annotation).floatValue());
1004                                                        }
1005                                                    } else if (object.getClass() == Double.class) {
1006                                                        if (subObject == null || (double) subObject < (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).doubleValue() + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? 1 : 0))) {
1007                                                            throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " <" + (((ExpectLessThan) annotation).orEqual() ? "=" : "") + " " + ((ExpectLessThan) annotation).doubleValue());
1008                                                        }
1009                                                    } else {
1010                                                        throw new ExpectFailedException(subKey + " is not a number");
1011                                                    }
1012                                                }
1013                                            }
1014                                        }
1015
1016                                        if (!shouldIgnoreObject(subObject, false)) {
1017                                            field.set(object, subObject);
1018                                        }
1019                                    }
1020                                }
1021                            }
1022
1023                            return object;
1024                        } else {
1025                            throw new InvalidTypeException(type.getRawClass());
1026                        }
1027                    }
1028                    case ParsedArray parsedArray -> {
1029                        if (type instanceof CollectionType) {
1030                            Collection<Object> object;
1031                            if (!type.getRawClass().isInterface()) {
1032                                object = (Collection<Object>) InitializationUtil.initialize(type.getRawClass());
1033                            } else {
1034                                object = InitializationUtil.initialize(LinkedList.class);
1035                            }
1036
1037                            for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1038                                Object subObject = toObject(subElement, type.getContentType());
1039                                if (!shouldIgnoreObject(subObject, true)) {
1040                                    object.add(subObject);
1041                                }
1042                            }
1043
1044                            return object;
1045                        } else if (type instanceof ArrayType) {
1046                            if (type.getRawClass() == byte[].class) {
1047                                byte[] array = (byte[]) InitializationUtil.initializePrimitiveArray(byte.class, element.asArray().getSize());
1048
1049                                int i = 0;
1050                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1051                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, byte.class);
1052                                    array[i] = (byte) (subObject != null ? subObject : 0);
1053
1054                                    i++;
1055                                }
1056
1057                                return array;
1058                            } else if (type.getRawClass() == char[].class) {
1059                                char[] array = (char[]) InitializationUtil.initializePrimitiveArray(char.class, element.asArray().getSize());
1060
1061                                int i = 0;
1062                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1063                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, char.class);
1064                                    array[i] = (char) (subObject != null ? subObject : 0);
1065
1066                                    i++;
1067                                }
1068
1069                                return array;
1070                            } else if (type.getRawClass() == short[].class) {
1071                                short[] array = (short[]) InitializationUtil.initializePrimitiveArray(short.class, element.asArray().getSize());
1072
1073                                int i = 0;
1074                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1075                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, short.class);
1076                                    array[i] = (short) (subObject != null ? subObject : 0);
1077
1078                                    i++;
1079                                }
1080
1081                                return array;
1082                            } else if (type.getRawClass() == int[].class) {
1083                                int[] array = (int[]) InitializationUtil.initializePrimitiveArray(int.class, element.asArray().getSize());
1084
1085                                int i = 0;
1086                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1087                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, int.class);
1088                                    array[i] = (int) (subObject != null ? subObject : 0);
1089
1090                                    i++;
1091                                }
1092
1093                                return array;
1094                            } else if (type.getRawClass() == long[].class) {
1095                                long[] array = (long[]) InitializationUtil.initializePrimitiveArray(long.class, element.asArray().getSize());
1096
1097                                int i = 0;
1098                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1099                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, long.class);
1100                                    array[i] = (long) (subObject != null ? subObject : 0L);
1101
1102                                    i++;
1103                                }
1104
1105                                return array;
1106                            } else if (type.getRawClass() == float[].class) {
1107                                float[] array = (float[]) InitializationUtil.initializePrimitiveArray(float.class, element.asArray().getSize());
1108
1109                                int i = 0;
1110                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1111                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, float.class);
1112                                    array[i] = (float) (subObject != null ? subObject : 0.0f);
1113
1114                                    i++;
1115                                }
1116
1117                                return array;
1118                            } else if (type.getRawClass() == double[].class) {
1119                                double[] array = (double[]) InitializationUtil.initializePrimitiveArray(double.class, element.asArray().getSize());
1120
1121                                int i = 0;
1122                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1123                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, double.class);
1124                                    array[i] = (double) (subObject != null ? subObject : 0.0d);
1125
1126                                    i++;
1127                                }
1128
1129                                return array;
1130                            } else if (type.getRawClass() == boolean[].class) {
1131                                boolean[] array = (boolean[]) InitializationUtil.initializePrimitiveArray(boolean.class, element.asArray().getSize());
1132
1133                                int i = 0;
1134                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1135                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, boolean.class);
1136                                    array[i] = (boolean) (subObject != null ? subObject : false);
1137
1138                                    i++;
1139                                }
1140
1141                                return array;
1142                            } else {
1143                                int size = element.asArray().getSize();
1144
1145                                if (ignoreArrayNulls || ignoreEmptyObjects) {
1146                                    size = 0;
1147
1148                                    for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1149                                        Object subObject = toObject(subElement, type.getContentType().getRawClass());
1150                                        if (!shouldIgnoreObject(subObject, true)) {
1151                                            size++;
1152                                        }
1153                                    }
1154                                }
1155
1156                                Object[] array = InitializationUtil.initializeArray(type.getContentType().getRawClass(), size);
1157
1158                                int i = 0;
1159                                for (ParsedElement subElement : element.asArray().getValues()) {
1160                                    Object subObject = toObject(subElement, type.getContentType().getRawClass());
1161                                    if (!shouldIgnoreObject(subObject, true)) {
1162                                        array[i] = subObject;
1163
1164                                        i++;
1165                                    }
1166                                }
1167
1168                                return array;
1169                            }
1170                        } else {
1171                            throw new InvalidTypeException(type.getRawClass());
1172                        }
1173                    }
1174                    default -> {
1175                        throw new InvalidTypeException(type.getRawClass());
1176                    }
1177                }
1178            } else {
1179                throw new InvalidTypeException(type.getRawClass());
1180            }
1181        } catch (Exception e) {
1182            throw new ProcessorException(e);
1183        }
1184    }
1185
1186    /**
1187     * Maps this Object into a {@link io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.elements.ParsedElement}
1188     *
1189     * @param object The object to map
1190     *
1191     * @return A new {@link io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.elements.ParsedElement} with the values of object
1192     *
1193     * @throws io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.exception.ProcessorException If there is an exception while processing
1194     * @since 1.0.0
1195     */
1196    public @NotNull ParsedElement toElement(@Nullable Object object) {
1197        try {
1198            if (object == null) {
1199                return ParsedPrimitive.fromNull();
1200            }
1201
1202            try {
1203                JavaType type = TypeFactory.defaultInstance().constructSimpleType(object.getClass(), new JavaType[] { });
1204
1205                Optional<TypeProcessor> typeProcessor = typeProcessors.entrySet().stream().filter(entry -> TypeUtils.isTypeOrSuperTypeOf(type, entry.getKey())).sorted((entryA, entryB) -> TypeUtils.sortDistance(type, entryA.getKey(), entryB.getKey())).map(Map.Entry::getValue).findFirst();
1206                if (typeProcessor.isPresent()) {
1207                    return typeProcessor.get().toElement(object);
1208                }
1209            } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
1210                // Class has type parameters, continue
1211            }
1212
1213            try {
1214                return ParsedPrimitive.from(object);
1215            } catch (ClassCastException e) {
1216                // Not a primitive, continue
1217            }
1218
1219            switch (object) {
1220                case Enum<?> anEnum -> {
1221                    return ParsedPrimitive.fromString(anEnum.name());
1222                }
1223                case byte[] bytes -> {
1224                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1225
1226                    for (byte item : Arrays.copyOf(bytes, bytes.length)) {
1227                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1228                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1229                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1230                        }
1231                    }
1232
1233                    return arrayElement;
1234                }
1235                case char[] chars -> {
1236                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1237
1238                    for (char item : Arrays.copyOf(chars, chars.length)) {
1239                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1240                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1241                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1242                        }
1243                    }
1244
1245                    return arrayElement;
1246                }
1247                case short[] shorts -> {
1248                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1249
1250                    for (short item : Arrays.copyOf(shorts, shorts.length)) {
1251                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1252                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1253                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1254                        }
1255                    }
1256
1257                    return arrayElement;
1258                }
1259                case int[] integers -> {
1260                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1261
1262                    for (int item : Arrays.copyOf(integers, integers.length)) {
1263                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1264                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1265                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1266                        }
1267                    }
1268
1269                    return arrayElement;
1270                }
1271                case long[] longs -> {
1272                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1273
1274                    for (long item : Arrays.copyOf(longs, longs.length)) {
1275                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1276                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1277                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1278                        }
1279                    }
1280
1281                    return arrayElement;
1282                }
1283                case float[] floats -> {
1284                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1285
1286                    for (float item : Arrays.copyOf(floats, floats.length)) {
1287                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1288                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1289                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1290                        }
1291                    }
1292
1293                    return arrayElement;
1294                }
1295                case double[] doubles -> {
1296                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1297
1298                    for (double item : Arrays.copyOf(doubles, doubles.length)) {
1299                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1300                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1301                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1302                        }
1303                    }
1304
1305                    return arrayElement;
1306                }
1307                case boolean[] booleans -> {
1308                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1309
1310                    for (boolean item : Arrays.copyOf(booleans, booleans.length)) {
1311                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1312                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1313                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1314                        }
1315                    }
1316
1317                    return arrayElement;
1318                }
1319                case Object[] objects -> {
1320                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1321
1322                    for (Object item : Arrays.copyOf(objects, objects.length)) {
1323                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1324                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1325                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1326                        }
1327                    }
1328
1329                    return arrayElement;
1330                }
1331                case Collection<?> objects -> {
1332                    ParsedArray arrayElement = ParsedArray.create();
1333
1334                    for (Object item : List.copyOf(objects)) {
1335                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(item);
1336                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1337                            arrayElement.add(subElement);
1338                        }
1339                    }
1340
1341                    return arrayElement;
1342                }
1343                case Map<?, ?> map -> {
1344                    ParsedObject objectElement = ParsedObject.create();
1345
1346                    for (Map.Entry<?, ?> entry : Map.copyOf(map).entrySet()) {
1347                        ParsedElement subElement = toElement(entry.getValue());
1348                        if (!shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1349                            objectElement.set(toString(entry.getKey()), subElement);
1350                        }
1351                    }
1352
1353                    return objectElement;
1354                }
1355                default -> {
1356                    ParsedObject objectElement = ParsedObject.create();
1357
1358                    Object defaultObject = null;
1359                    if (ignoreDefaults) {
1360                        try {
1361                            defaultObject = InitializationUtil.initialize(object.getClass());
1362                        } catch (InitializationException e) {
1363                            if (BJSL.getLogger() != null) {
1364                                BJSL.getLogger().warning("Initialization of " + object.getClass().getSimpleName() + " failed, defaults will not be ignored");
1365
1366                                StringWriter stringWriter = new StringWriter();
1367                                PrintWriter writer = new PrintWriter(stringWriter);
1368                                e.printStackTrace(writer);
1369                                BJSL.getLogger().warning(stringWriter.toString());
1370                            }
1371                        }
1372                    }
1373
1374                    List<Field> fields = getFields(object.getClass());
1375                    for (Field field : fields) {
1376                        if (!Modifier.isStatic(field.getModifiers()) && (field.canAccess(object) || field.trySetAccessible())) {
1377                            boolean shouldSerialize = !(Modifier.isTransient(field.getModifiers()) || field.getName().startsWith("this$"));
1378
1379                            String subKey = field.getName();
1380                            ParsedElement subElement = toElement(field.get(object));
1381
1382                            if (shouldIgnoreElement(subElement)) {
1383                                shouldSerialize = false;
1384                            }
1385
1386                            if (ignoreDefaults && (subElement.isPrimitive() && (!subElement.asPrimitive().isNull() ? subElement.asPrimitive().get().equals(field.get(defaultObject)) : field.get(defaultObject) == null))) {
1387                                shouldSerialize = false;
1388                            }
1389
1390                            for (Annotation annotation : field.getDeclaredAnnotations()) {
1391                                if (annotation.annotationType() == AlwaysSerialize.class) {
1392                                    shouldSerialize = true;
1393                                } else if (annotation.annotationType() == NeverSerialize.class) {
1394                                    shouldSerialize = false;
1395                                } else if (annotation.annotationType() == Rename.class) {
1396                                    subKey = ((Rename) annotation).value();
1397                                }
1398                            }
1399
1400                            if (shouldSerialize) {
1401                                objectElement.set(subKey, subElement);
1402                            }
1403                        }
1404                    }
1405
1406                    return objectElement;
1407                }
1408            }
1409        } catch (Exception e) {
1410            throw new ProcessorException(e);
1411        }
1412    }
1413
1414    /**
1415     * Maps this primitive Object into a {@link java.lang.String}
1416     *
1417     * @param object The object to map
1418     *
1419     * @return A new {@link java.lang.String} with the value of the object
1420     *
1421     * @throws io.github.kale_ko.bjsl.processor.exception.ProcessorException If there is an exception while processing
1422     * @since 2.0.0
1423     */
1424    protected @NotNull String toString(@Nullable Object object) {
1425        try {
1426            ParsedElement element = toElement(object);
1427
1428            if (element.isPrimitive()) {
1429                ParsedPrimitive primitive = element.asPrimitive();
1430
1431                return primitive.toString();
1432            } else {
1433                throw new NotAPrimitiveException(element);
1434            }
1435        } catch (ProcessorException e) {
1436            throw e;
1437        } catch (Exception e) {
1438            throw new ProcessorException(e);
1439        }
1440    }
1441
1442
1443    /**
1444     * Get all the fields on a class and its superclasses
1445     *
1446     * @param clazz The class to get the fields of
1447     * @param <T>   The class to get the fields of
1448     *
1449     * @return All the fields on the class and its superclasses
1450     *
1451     * @since 1.0.0
1452     */
1453    protected static <T> @NotNull List<Field> getFields(@NotNull Class<T> clazz) {
1454        Set<String> fieldNames = new HashSet<>();
1455        List<Field> fields = new ArrayList<>(Arrays.asList(clazz.getDeclaredFields()));
1456
1457        Class<?> superClazz = clazz.getSuperclass();
1458        if (superClazz != null && superClazz != Object.class) {
1459            List<Field> superFields = getFields(superClazz);
1460
1461            for (Field superField : superFields) {
1462                boolean overwritten = fieldNames.contains(superField.getName());
1463
1464                if (!(overwritten || Modifier.isTransient(superField.getModifiers()))) {
1465                    fieldNames.add(superField.getName());
1466                    fields.add(superField);
1467                }
1468            }
1469        }
1470
1471        return fields;
1472    }
1473}
